mechanism: Measure empirical judgments of intentionality via vignette-based scenarios, varying outcome valence (harm vs help) while holding agent foreknowledge constant. Analyze correlation between moral evaluation (blame/praise) and intentionality attribution to detect asymmetry in causal reasoning about action.

Construct dichotomized task-participation vectors (5 household chores: participate yes/no) for males across 32 countries; apply probabilistic Guttman scaling (Mokken) to identify latent task-avoidance hierarchy; test multinomial logistic models on individual characteristics (education, time, resources, gender ideology) and country-level welfare typology to predict task-performance classes.

Construct four latent framing-dimensions (utilitarian, cosmopolitan, communitarian, libertarian) from 13-item Likert multiple-choice survey responses via confirmatory factor analysis; pool 16 repeated cross-section surveys (2004-2013); employ three-level multilevel regression (citizens nested in survey-waves nested in countries) with interactions between individual education and macro-conditions (GDP growth, unemployment) to predict framing-dimension scores.

Construct parental SES index from 4 standardized indicators (parental education ISLED, parental occupation ISEI, combined via principal component analysis); discretize union-formation timing into person-year records (ages 15-35); estimate country-specific discrete-time logistic models for each of 25 countries; meta-analyze coefficients to test cross-national heterogeneity; meta-regress country effects on three country-level SDT indicators (cohabitation prevalence, age-norm, religiosity).

Enroll newly diagnosed Type 2 diabetes patients into randomized trial; intervention group attends 6-week course (4 group 2h-sessions + 2 individual 1h-sessions) implementing five-step proactive-coping plan (goal-setting, barrier-anticipation, strategy-planning, implementation-intention writing, progress-monitoring); control group receives standard brochure; measure outcomes (proactive coping inventory, self-reported goal achievement, self-efficacy scale) via pre-post questionnaires; analyze with two-by-two ANOVA (group by time) with repeated measures.
